title: elephantopus pratensis subsp. arenarius
intro: Elephantopus pratensis subsp. arenarius, also known as the swampy elephantopus, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues due to its bioactive compounds. Traditionally, the swampy elephantopus is used in herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, though more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
